style_name: Rough Ink Music Doodle Poster Style
style_summary: A rough hand-inked poster style built from oversized dark green-black brush lettering, pale blush paper, hot pink secondary type, naive mascot drawings, teal and pink flat fills, sharp yellow burst marks, scattered music-note doodles, and scanned risograph-like print texture.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main simplified mascot, person, or object group
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: main action, gesture, or frozen performance moment
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized instrument, wellness object, snack, tool, product, or ritual prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: minimal poster setting or implied environment
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: secondary doodles, labels, small props, rhythm marks, stars, steam, arrows, or loose line marks
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small stacked supporting text or bracketed label
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: burst, music note, sparkle, bracket, capsule, slash, or loose marker sign
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: simple flat garment or mascot styling direction
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source content that generated samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: Pale blush paper background with a lightly scanned, warm off-white finish.
Oversized rough brush headline in deep green-black ink, with broken edges and uneven pressure.
Hot pink secondary typography placed as small stacked text blocks, labels, or date-like graphic notes.
Flat naive mascot or figure drawings with thick scratchy outlines and simplified anatomy.
Limited accent palette: deep green-black linework, hot pink fills, teal green fills, and acidic yellow bursts.
Poster layout uses asymmetrical open space with separate floating illustration clusters rather than a boxed grid.
Large title mass sits high or to one side while drawings orbit around it at different scales.
Graphic energy comes from music notes, starbursts, brackets, scribbles, loose motion lines, and imperfect registration.
Depth is almost flat, with playful scale distortion instead of realistic perspective.
Texture shows dry ink, screenprint grain, speckled fills, and small gaps where color misses the outline.
Text is treated as drawn poster matter, not as polished digital typography.
Overall mood is playful, odd, wellness-adjacent, and music-event-like without becoming slick or corporate.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not copy the original Chinese campaign headline or its exact block arrangement.
Do not include the original platform badge, app branding, watermarks, usernames, or creator marks.
Do not recreate the music prescription phrase, the exact English copy, or the original date range.
Do not use goji berries, a small medicine bowl, or the original bracketed ingredient label.
Do not recreate the seated horned figure in a pink jacket listening on black speakers.
Do not recreate the green seated guitarist pose, the same pink guitar, or the same yellow lightning placement.
Do not reuse the source story premise of cyber wellness through a music prescription.
Do not copy the same top-left headline, top-right copy, lower-left character, and lower-right date layout.

visual_deconstruction.overall_style_category: rough hand-inked risograph music poster, naive wellness flyer, underground doodle event graphic
visual_deconstruction.composition_and_layout: large brush-lettered headline dominates the upper area, while independent doodle vignettes float through the middle and lower frame; small pink text blocks live at edges and near props; negative space remains visible between clusters
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: subjects are simplified mascots, performers, or ritual props placed as separate cutout-like drawings; one or two figures can sit or lean low in the frame while smaller objects hover nearby
visual_deconstruction.camera_angle_or_perspective: mostly flat poster perspective with deliberately naive scale shifts; instruments, bursts, props, and bodies tilt without realistic depth
visual_deconstruction.typography_style: huge rough dark green-black brush characters for the main headline; small hot pink condensed serif-like or hand-rendered labels; occasional bracketed micro labels as graphic marks
visual_deconstruction.color_palette_behavior: pale blush ground carries the whole poster; deep green-black controls linework and headline; hot pink fills garments, type, and props; teal green acts as a secondary flat fill; acidic yellow appears only as sharp starburst emphasis
visual_deconstruction.graphic_elements: music notes, starbursts, bracket labels, small capsules, steam lines, motion ticks, scribble curls, floating punctuation, and loose contour marks
visual_deconstruction.texture_and_finish: dry marker edge, scuffed ink, imperfect overprint, speckled fills, rough paper grain, and slightly misregistered color blocks
visual_deconstruction.lighting: flat graphic lighting with no realistic shadows; contrast comes from dark ink against pale paper and small saturated color hits
visual_deconstruction.mood: playful, handmade, slightly absurd, cozy, music-driven, wellness-themed, zine-like, and informal

primary_structure: Reserve one large zone for an oversized rough brush headline in deep green-black ink.
Keep the background open and pale so the headline and mascots breathe.
Build the image from two to four floating vignette clusters rather than a full realistic scene.
Use one main mascot or figure cluster and one prop or product cluster at a different scale.
Place small hot pink supporting copy near a corner, along an edge, or next to a prop.
Add an acidic yellow burst, sparkle, or slash as the loudest accent, but keep it secondary to the headline.
Scatter music notes, brackets, steam, and loose line marks in the open space.
Let the poster feel manually assembled, with imperfect spacing and no precise alignment.
composition.vertical_9x16: Stack the massive brush headline in the upper third or upper half, then let mascot and prop clusters descend diagonally through the page with small pink labels at the edge.
composition.horizontal_16x9: Spread the headline across the left or upper band, then arrange figure and prop clusters across the remaining field with one strong yellow burst crossing the open space.

typography.headline: very large, short, rough hand-brushed dark green-black letters with dry edges, chunky strokes, uneven baseline, and tactile ink texture
typography.secondary_label: small hot pink text, stacked or bracketed, used as graphic texture rather than long readable body copy
typography.supporting_text: brief labels can sit near objects, in brackets, or at corners; keep them sparse and poster-like
typography.text_behavior: all type should look manually placed and printed, with imperfect spacing, no clean UI typography, and no copied source wording

image_treatment.linework: thick, uneven, scratchy dark ink outlines with broken marker texture and visible hand wobble
image_treatment.fills: flat saturated color blocks that slightly miss or overrun the outlines, like quick screenprint layers
image_treatment.texture: subtle paper grain, scuffed ink, speckled halftone-like roughness, and soft scanned poster edges
image_treatment.shading: minimal or none; occasional dark hatch strokes and black filled shapes only
image_treatment.detail_density: medium sparse: enough doodle marks to feel musical and handmade, but not a dense illustrated world

design_rules: Keep the main headline visually dominant and visibly hand-brushed.
Use pale blush paper as the uninterrupted base, not a gradient or scenic background.
Limit the palette to deep green-black, hot pink, teal green, and a small hit of acidic yellow.
Draw subjects as simplified handmade mascots, performers, or ritual objects with naive anatomy.
Use independent floating clusters and open negative space instead of realistic environments.
Treat small text as poster texture: stacked, bracketed, sparse, and hot pink.
Use music-note doodles, starbursts, brackets, steam lines, and loose scribbles as recurring grammar.
Preserve scuffed ink, rough edges, and imperfect print registration in every sample.
Make all case content original and avoid source text, source props, source date, and source platform marks.
do: Use a handmade music-event poster feeling with wellness-adjacent oddness.
Use giant rough dark brush lettering and small hot pink supporting labels.
Use flat mascot drawings, oversized props, and playful scale distortion.
Use teal and pink flat fills with one acidic yellow burst or sparkle.
Keep the layout airy, asymmetric, and visibly printed on pale paper.
avoid: copying the source campaign headline, music prescription wording, platform badge, date range, ingredient label, or exact layout
goji berries, medicine bowl, seated horned listener, green seated guitarist, same pink guitar, or same yellow lightning arrangement
watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, app marks, QR codes, signatures, brand logos, or recognizable people
photorealism, 3D rendering, glossy vector art, polished corporate typography, clean icons, gradients, or cinematic lighting
dense scenery, realistic perspective, long readable paragraphs, luxury editorial mood, or a one-color monochrome palette
prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} finished raster poster image in the Rough Ink Music Doodle Poster Style. Preserve these style fidelity anchors first: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Avoid these source-specific elements completely: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. The poster should show {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP} as an oversized graphic prop, set in {LOCATION}. Add {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS} as floating doodle clusters. Use the main headline text "{MAIN_TEXT}" as huge rough deep green-black brush lettering, plus "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" as small hot pink stacked or bracketed supporting text. Include {ACCENT_SYMBOL} as a sharp graphic accent. Style the subject with {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Use pale blush paper, deep green-black scratchy outlines, hot pink and teal flat fills, one acidic yellow burst, scattered music-note marks, loose scribbles, dry marker texture, scuffed risograph grain, imperfect registration, flat poster perspective, airy asymmetric composition, and handmade zine-event energy. Do not use polished digital typography, realistic lighting, 3D depth, brand marks, watermarks, QR codes, copied source text, or copied source characters.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, app UI, QR code, signature, copied source headline, copied source English phrase, original date range, platform badge, goji berries, medicine bowl, seated horned listener, green seated guitarist, same pink guitar, exact yellow lightning layout, brand logo, licensed character, recognizable person, photorealism, 3D render, glossy vector art, clean corporate icon set, smooth gradients, cinematic lighting, airbrush shading, realistic anatomy, precise perspective, dense city scene, long paragraphs, beige monochrome design, luxury editorial design
